'''ây-j-ng''' ('''yajanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lift|lift]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-j-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lift|lift]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-j-ng
|-
! Lemma
| yajanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yajangithi|yajangithi]] || [[word:yajangiji|yajangiji]] || [[word:yajangishi|yajangishi]] || [[word:yajangi|yajangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajanguthuth|yajanguthuth]] || [[word:yajangujuj|yajangujuj]] || [[word:yajangushush|yajangushush]] || [[word:yajang|yajang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajanguthu|yajanguthu]] || [[word:yajanguju|yajanguju]] || [[word:yajangushu|yajangushu]] || [[word:yajangu|yajangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajangufuth|yajangufuth]] || [[word:yajangufuj|yajangufuj]] || [[word:yajangufush|yajangufush]] || [[word:yajanguf|yajanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yajangethe|yajangethe]] || [[word:yajangeje|yajangeje]] || [[word:yajangeshe|yajangeshe]] || [[word:yajange|yajange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajangothoth|yajangothoth]] || [[word:yajangojoj|yajangojoj]] || [[word:yajangoshosh|yajangoshosh]] || [[word:yajang|yajang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajangotho|yajangotho]] || [[word:yajangojo|yajangojo]] || [[word:yajangosho|yajangosho]] || [[word:yajango|yajango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajangofoth|yajangofoth]] || [[word:yajangofoj|yajangofoj]] || [[word:yajangofosh|yajangofosh]] || [[word:yajangof|yajangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yajangĂŠthĂŠ|yajangĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yajangĂŠjĂŠ|yajangĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yajangĂŠshĂŠ|yajangĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yajangĂŠ|yajangĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yajangathath|yajangathath]] || [[word:yajangajaj|yajangajaj]] || [[word:yajangashash|yajangashash]] || [[word:yajang|yajang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yajangatha|yajangatha]] || [[word:yajangaja|yajangaja]] || [[word:yajangasha|yajangasha]] || [[word:yajanga|yajanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yajangafath|yajangafath]] || [[word:yajangafaj|yajangafaj]] || [[word:yajangafash|yajangafash]] || [[word:yajangaf|yajangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yajangasha|yajangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyajangasha|goyajangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyajangasha|gokiyajangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yajangnĂŒsha|yajangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyajangnknĂŒsha|goyajangnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyajangnĂŒsha|gokiyajangnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yajangshĂ«sha|yajangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyajangnkshĂ«sha|goyajangnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyajangshĂ«sha|gokiyajangshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yajangrosha|yajangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyajangnkrosha|goyajangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyajangrosha|gokiyajangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yajangmusha|yajangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajangnkmusha|goyajangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajangmusha|gokiyajangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yajangsherasha|yajangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyajangnksherasha|goyajangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyajangsherasha|gokiyajangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yajangasha|yajangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyajangnkngasha|goyajangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyajangasha|gokiyajangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yajangyasha|yajangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyajangnkyasha|goyajangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyajangyasha|gokiyajangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yajangyamasha|yajangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyajangnkyamasha|goyajangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyajangyamasha|gokiyajangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yajangnĂŒshĂ«sha|yajangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyajangnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyajangnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyajangnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyajangnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yajangnĂŒrosha|yajangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyajangnknĂŒrosha|goyajangnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyajangnĂŒrosha|gokiyajangnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajangnĂŒmusha|yajangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajangnknĂŒmusha|goyajangnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajangnĂŒmusha|gokiyajangnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yajangshĂ«nĂŒsha|yajangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyajangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyajangnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyajangshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyajangshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yajangshĂ«rosha|yajangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyajangnkshĂ«rosha|goyajangnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyajangshĂ«rosha|gokiyajangshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajangshĂ«musha|yajangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajangnkshĂ«musha|goyajangnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajangshĂ«musha|gokiyajangshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yajangronĂŒsha|yajangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyajangnkronĂŒsha|goyajangnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyajangronĂŒsha|gokiyajangronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yajangroshĂ«sha|yajangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyajangnkroshĂ«sha|goyajangnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyajangroshĂ«sha|gokiyajangroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yajangromusha|yajangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyajangnkromusha|goyajangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyajangromusha|gokiyajangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yajangmunĂŒsha|yajangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyajangnkmunĂŒsha|goyajangnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyajangmunĂŒsha|gokiyajangmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yajangmushĂ«sha|yajangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyajangnkmushĂ«sha|goyajangnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyajangmushĂ«sha|gokiyajangmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yajangmurosha|yajangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyajangnkmurosha|goyajangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyajangmurosha|gokiyajangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yajang|yajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠjĂŠng|yĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyajang|hoyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠjĂŠng|hoyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyajang|hohoyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠjĂŠng|hohoyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyajang|nĂŒyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠjĂŠng|nĂŒyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyajang|nĂŒnĂŒyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠjĂŠng|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyajang|nĂŻyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠjĂŠng|nĂŻyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyajang|nĂŻnĂŻyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠjĂŠng|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyajang|luyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠjĂŠng|luyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyajang|luluyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠjĂŠng|luluyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyajang|liyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠjĂŠng|liyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyajang|liliyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠjĂŠng|liliyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyajang|koyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠjĂŠng|koyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyajang|kokoyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠjĂŠng|kokoyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyajang|keyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠjĂŠng|keyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyajang|kekeyajang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠjĂŠng|kekeyĂŠjĂŠng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
